cocktails.name: Coffee-Vodka
cocktails.instructions: Boil water and sugar until dissolved. Turn off heat. Slowly add dry instant coffee and continue stirring. Add a chopped vanilla bean to the vodka, then combine the cooled sugar syrup and coffee solution with the vodka. Cover tightly and shake vigorously each day for 3 weeks. Strain and filter. Its also best to let the sugar mixture cool completely so the vodka won't evaporate when its added. If you like a smoother feel to the liqueur you can add about 1 teaspoon of glycerine to the finished product.

cocktails.name: Drinking Chocolate
cocktails.instructions: Heat the cream and milk with the cinnamon and vanilla bean very slowly for 15-20 minutes. (If you don't have any beans add 1-2 tsp of vanilla after heating). Remove the bean and cinnamon. Add the chocolate. Mix until fully melted. Serve topped with some very dense fresh whipped cream. Serves 1-2 depending upon how much of a glutton you are. For a richer chocolate, use 4 oz of milk, 4 oz of cream, 4 oz of chocolate. Serve in coffee mug.

cocktails.name: Egg Nog #4
cocktails.instructions: In a small mixer bowl beat egg yolks till blended. Gradually add 1/4 cup sugar, beating at high speed till thick and lemon colored. Stir in milk, stir in rum, bourbon, vanilla, and salt. Chill thoroughly. Whip cream. Wash beaters well. In a large mixer bowl beat egg whites till soft peaks form. Gradually add remaining 1/4 cup sugar, beating to stiff peaks. Fold yolk mixture and whipped cream into egg whites. Serve immediately. Sprinkle nutmeg over each serving. Serve in a punch bowl or another big bowl. NOTE: For a nonalcoholic eggnog, prepare Eggnog as above, except omit the bourbon and rum and increase the milk to 3 cups.

cocktails.name: English Highball
cocktails.instructions: Pour brandy, gin, and sweet vermouth into a highball glass over ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water. Add the twist of lemon peel, stir, and serve. (Ginger ale may be substituted for carbonated water, if preferred.)

cocktails.name: Elderflower Caipirinha
cocktails.instructions: Take the glass and muddle the lime in it. Fill the glass with crushed ice and add the Cachaca. Stir well and top with some more crushed ice. Garnish with lime and enjoy!

cocktails.name: Egg-Nog - Classic Cooked
cocktails.instructions: In large saucepan, beat together eggs, sugar and salt, if desired. Stir in 2 cups of the milk. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until mixture is thick enough to coat a metal spoon and reaches 160 degrees F. Remove from heat. Stir in remaining 2 cups milk and vanilla. Cover and regfigerate until thoroughly chilled, several hours or overnight. Just before serving, pour into bowl or pitcher. Garnish or add stir-ins, if desired. Choose 1 or several of: Chocolate curls, cinnamon sticks, extracts of flavorings, flavored brandy or liqueur, fruit juice or nectar, ground nutmeg, maraschino cherries, orange slices, peppermint sticks or candy canes, plain brandy, run or whiskey, sherbet or ice-cream, whipping cream, whipped. Serve immediately.

cocktails.name: Empellón Cocina's Fat-Washed Mezcal
cocktails.instructions:
To ensure that your pork fat is just as delicious as theirs, here’s their adobo marinade and what to do with it (you’ll also need a rack of ribs):

4 ancho chiles, 8 guajillo chiles and 4 chipotle chiles, plus 4 cloves roasted garlic, half a cup of cider vinegar, a quarter teaspoon of Mexican oregano, 1 teaspoon of ground black pepper, a whole clove, a quarter teaspoon of ground cinnamon and a half teaspoon of ground cumin.

Toast the dried chiles and soak in water for at least an hour until they are rehydrated. Drain and discard the soaking liquid. Combine the soaked chiles with the remaining ingredients and purée until smooth.

Cold smoke a rack of baby back pork ribs by taking a large hotel pan with woodchips on one side and charcoal on the other. Place another, smaller, pan with pork ribs, above the charcoal/woodchip pan. Ignite the charcoal, being careful to not ignite the woodchips. Cover both pans with foil and allow to smoke for 10-15 minutes, until desired level of smoke is achieved, then coat with adobo marinade and wrap in tin foil prior to placing ribs in a 300 degree oven for 7 hours. When the ribs have cooled, strain off the fat and use for the infusion.

If you’re having a hard time coming up to the same kind of volume of fat, make up the balance with pork lard from a butcher. To get the same depth of flavor without the ribs, heat up the fat in a pot with a few spoons of the marinade.

Once you’ve got your tub of seasoned pork fat in cooled liquid form, pour equal amounts of Ilegal Joven mezcal and fat into a sealable container. Seal the container and give it a really good shake, then put it in the freezer overnight. When the whole thing is separated and congealed, pour it through a fine mesh chinoise. If you don’t have a chinoise, try a fine mesh strainer, or if you don’t have one of those, try spooning off most of the fat. There will be some beads of orange fat left in the strained mezcal: run that through a few layers of cheesecloth (or coffee filters in a pinch) to get rid of the last of it.

The mezcal is now ready for drinking, straight-up or in a cocktail. 

Habanero tincture

Slice habaneros and add 2 ounces Ilegal Joven mezcal.
Allow to sit overnight or until desired level of heat is achieved.
Cocktail

Combine mezcal and chocolate liqueur in a mixing glass with ice and stir for 45 seconds.
Strain into chilled coupe.
Carefully "sink" the coffee liqueur down the inside of the coupe over a spoon.
Garnish with 5 drops habanero tincture.

cocktails.name: Frosé
cocktails.instructions:
Step 1
Pour rosé into a 13x9" pan and freeze until almost solid (it won't completely solidify due to the alcohol), at least 6 hours.

Step 2
Meanwhile, bring sugar and ½ cup water to a boil in a medium saucepan; cook, stirring constantly, until sugar dissolves, about 3 minutes. Add strawberries, remove from heat, and let sit 30 minutes to infuse syrup with strawberry flavor. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small bowl (do not press on solids); cover and chill until cold, about 30 minutes.

Step 3
Scrape rosé into a blender. Add lemon juice, 3½ ounces strawberry syrup, and 1 cup crushed ice and purée until smooth. Transfer blender jar to freezer and freeze until frosé is thickened (aim for milkshake consistency), 25–35 minutes.

Step 4
Blend again until frosé is slushy. Divide among glasses.

Step 5
Do Ahead: Rosé can be frozen 1 week ahead.

cocktails.name: Frappé
cocktails.instructions: Mix together. Blend at highest blender speed for about 1 minute. Pour into a glass and drink with a straw. Notes: This works best if everything is cold (if you make fresh coffee, mix it with the milk and let it sit in the fridge for 1/2 hour. If it is not frothy, add more milk, or even just some more milk powder. The froth gradually turns to liquid at the bottom of the glass, so you will find that you can sit and drink this for about 1/2 hour, with more iced coffee continually appearing at the bottom. Very refreshing.

Add honey vodka, lemon juice, and a large ice cube (@glacioice). Shake until well chilled, and strain into glass. Add tonic water and finally 2 dashes of angostura bitters. Garnish with sliced figs and thyme.

Set light the concotion in the cocktail glass and start to drink through the straw (this drink should be drunk in one) , as the bottom of the glass is reached put out the fire by pouring the Baileys and Blue Curacao into the cocktail glass and keep drinking till it's all gone!!

cocktails.name: Flander's Flake-Out

Shake, and strain into a chilled cocktail glass or an Old Fashioned glass filled with fresh ice.

cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, lemon juice, sugar, and grenadine. Shake well. Pour into an old-fashioned glass and garnish with the cherry and the orange slice.

cocktails.name: Gin Lemon
cocktails.instructions: For the preparation of the gin lemon you will not need the shaker. Fill the tumbler with ice, pour the gin and lemonade over it. Gently mix and decorate with a slice of lemon. Those who prefer can also add a few mint leaves. Your gin lemon is ready to be served.

cocktails.name: Gin Sling
cocktails.instructions: Dissolve powdered sugar in mixture of water and juice of lemon. Add gin. Pour into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes and stir. Add the twist of orange peel and serve.

cocktails.name: Greyhound
cocktails.instructions:
Add the vodka to a Collins glass filled with ice.
Top with grapefruit juice and stir.

cocktails.name: Gin Rickey
cocktails.instructions: Half-fill a tall glass with ice. Mix the gin and Grenadine together and pour over the ice. Add the lime or lemon juice and top off with soda water. Decorate the glass with lime and/or lemon slices.

cocktails.name: Gin Squirt
cocktails.instructions: Stir gin, grenadine, and powdered sugar with ice and strain into a highball glass over ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water and stir. Decorate with the pineapple chunks and the strawberries and serve.

cocktails.name: Grand Blue
cocktails.instructions: Serve in an old fashioned glass.

cocktails.name: Gin Cooler
cocktails.instructions: Stir powdered sugar and 2 oz. carbonated water in a collins glass. Fill glass with ice and add gin. Fill with carbonated water and stir. Add the lemon peel and the orange spiral so that the end of the orange spiral dangles over rim of glass.

cocktails.name: Gin Swizzle
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the lime juice, sugar, gin, and bitters. Shake well. Almost fill a colling glass with ice cubes. Stir until the glass is frosted. Strain the mixture in the shaker into the glass and add the club soda.

cocktails.name: Grass Skirt
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, triple sec, pineapple juice, and grenadine. Shake well. Pour into an old-fashioned glass and garnish with the pineapple slice.

cocktails.name: Grasshopper
cocktails.instructions: Pour ingredients into a cocktail shaker with ice. Shake briskly and then strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Grim Reaper
cocktails.instructions: Mix Kahlua and 151 in glass. Quickly add ice and pour grenadine over ice to give ice red tint.

cocktails.name: Gin and Soda
cocktails.instructions:
Pour the Gin and Soda water into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes.
Stir well.
Garnish with the lime wedge.

cocktails.name: H.D.
cocktails.instructions: Mix the whisky and Baileys Cream in a beer-glass (at least 50 cl). Fill the rest of the glass with coffee.

cocktails.name: Honey Bee
cocktails.instructions: Shake ingredients with crushed ice

cocktails.name: Hot Toddy
cocktails.instructions:
STEP 1
Whisk the whisky and honey together and split between 2 heatproof glasses. Add half of the cinnamon stick to each, then top up with 200ml boiling water.

STEP 2
Add a splash of lemon juice to each, then taste and add more to your preference. Finish each with a slice of lemon, studded with a clove, and serve immediately.

cocktails.name: Herbal flame
cocktails.instructions: Pour Hot Damn 100 in bottom of a jar or regular glass. Fill the rest of the glass with sweet tea. Stir with spoon, straw, or better yet a cinnamon stick and leave it in.

cocktails.name: Horse's Neck
cocktails.instructions: Pour brandy and ginger ale directly into highball glass with ice cubes. Stir gently. Garnish with lemon zest. If desired, add dashes of Angostura Bitter.

cocktails.name: Happy Skipper
cocktails.instructions: Pour Captain Morgan's Spiced Rum over ice, fill glass to top with Ginger Ale. Garnish with lime. Tastes like a cream soda. Named for the Gilligan's Island reference ("The Captain" *in* "Ginger" is a Happy Skipper!)

cocktails.name: Hunter's Moon
cocktails.instructions: Put the Bombay Sapphire, Martini Bianco, sugar syrup & blackberries in a cocktail shaker with lots of ice and shake vigorously before pouring into a balloon glass, topping up with lemonade and garnishing with a wedge of orange.

cocktails.name: Halloween Punch
cocktails.instructions:
Tip the cherry juice, orange peel, chilli, cinnamon sticks, cloves and ginger into a large saucepan. Simmer for 5 mins, then turn off the heat. Leave to cool, then chill for at least 4 hrs, or up to 2 days – the longer you leave it the more intense the flavours. If serving to young children, take the chilli out after a few hours.

When you’re ready to serve, pour the juice into a jug. Serve in glass bottles or glasses and pop a straw in each. If you're adding vodka, do so at this stage. Dangle a fangs sweet from each glass.

cocktails.name: Havana Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Holloween Punch
cocktails.instructions: Take a bunch of grape juice and a bunch of fizzy stuff (club soda, ginger ale, lemonlime, whatever). Mix them in a punch bowl. Take orange sherbet and lime sherbet. Scoop out scoops and float them in the punch, let them melt a little so that a nasty film spreads all over the top of the punch but there are still "bubbles" in it in the form of sherbet scoops. Looks horrible, tastes just fine.

cocktails.name: Homemade Kahlua
cocktails.instructions: Dissolve sugar in 2 cups of boiling water and add corn syrup. Dissolve the instant coffee in the remaining water. Pour syrup and coffee in a gallon jug. Let it cool. Add vodka and vanilla when cold. For the best result, let the mixture "mature" for 4-5 weeks.

cocktails.name: Hot Creamy Bush
cocktails.instructions: Combine all ingredients in glass

cocktails.name: Harvey Wallbanger
cocktails.instructions: Stir the vodka and orange juice with ice in the glass, then float the Galliano on top. Garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: Hawaiian Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Hemingway Special
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker with ice. Shake.

cocktails.name: Highland Fling Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients (except olive) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Add the olive and serve.

cocktails.name: Hot Chocolate to Die for
cocktails.instructions: Melt the chocolate, butter and vanilla in a double boiler. When just smooth stir in the cream.

cocktails.name: Ipamena
cocktails.instructions: Cut half a lime into pieces, place in a shaker, add the sugar and crush. Measure the passion fruit juice, add it to the shaker and fill up with ice cubes. Close the shaker and shake vigorously. Pour the liquid into a glass, top up with ginger ale, stir with a teaspoon and then garnish the rim of the glass with a slice of lime

cocktails.name: Ice Pick
cocktails.instructions: Put Vodka in glass fill with iced tea. Stir in lemon to taste.

cocktails.name: Iced Coffee
cocktails.instructions: Mix together until coffee and sugar is dissolved. Add milk. Shake well. Using a blender or milk shake maker produces a very foamy drink. Serve in coffee mug.

cocktails.name: Irish Cream
cocktails.instructions: Mix scotch and milk. Add half-and-half. Add rest.

cocktails.name: Irish Coffee
cocktails.instructions: Heat the coffee, whiskey and sugar; do not boil. Pour into glass and top with cream; serve hot.

cocktails.name: Irish Spring
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients (except orange slice and cherry) into a collins glass over ice cubes. Garnish with the slice of orange, add the cherry on top, and serve.

cocktails.name: Imperial Fizz
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a highball glass over two ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Irish Russian
cocktails.instructions: Add the ingredients in the order listed in the recipe. Care must be taken when adding the Guinness to prevent an excess of foam. Do Not add ice.

cocktails.name: Imperial Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake with ice and strain into cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Iced Coffee Fillip
cocktails.instructions: Mix together in a coffee mug and chill before serving.

cocktails.name: Irish Curdling Cow
cocktails.instructions: Pour Irish Cream, Vodka, and Bourbon in a glass. Add some ice and mix in the orange juice.

cocktails.name: Jam Donut
cocktails.instructions: Coat the rim of a shot glass with sugar using sugar syrup to stick. Add the Chambord raspberry liqueur to the shot glass, and carefully layer the Baileys Irish Cream on top. Serve.

cocktails.name: Jitterbug
cocktails.instructions: Wet glass, dip rim in sugar. Then add Ice. Then add everything else. It's that simple!

cocktails.name: Jackhammer
cocktails.instructions: Serve over ice- Warning,Deadly!

cocktails.name: Jelly Bean
cocktails.instructions: mix equal parts in pony glass-tastes just like a jelly bean!

cocktails.name: Jello shots
cocktails.instructions: Boil 3 cups of water then add jello. Mix jello and water until jello is completely disolved. Add the two cups of vodka and mix together. Pour mixture into plastic shot glasses and chill until firm. Then, eat away...

cocktails.name: Jamaica Kiss
cocktails.instructions: Fill a tumbler with ice cubes. Add a shot of Tia Maria and a shot of Jamaican light rum. Fill the tumbler with milk. Blend until smooth and serve immediately.

cocktails.name: John Collins
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients directly into highball glass filled with ice. Stir gently. Garnish. Add a dash of Angostura bitters.

cocktails.name: Japanese Fizz
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a highball glass over two ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Jamaican Coffee
cocktails.instructions: Stir the rum, coffee and water together. Top with the whipped cream. Sprinkle with a pinch of well ground coffee and drink with a straw.

cocktails.name: Just a Moonmint
cocktails.instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended. Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Jewel Of The Nile
cocktails.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Jack Rose Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Jack's Vanilla Coke
cocktails.instructions: After pouring in your ingredients, and adding 3-5 ice cubes, according to taste. Stir the drink with a stirrer to get the Vanilla off the bottom.

cocktails.name: Kir
cocktails.instructions: Add the crème de cassis to the bottom of the glass, then top up with wine.

cocktails.name: Karsk
cocktails.instructions: Put a copper coin in a coffe-cup and fill up with coffee until you no longer see the coin, then add alcohol until you see the coin. Norwegian speciality.

cocktails.name: Kamikaze
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients together with ice. Strain into glass, garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: Kir Royale
cocktails.instructions: Pour Creme de cassis in glass, gently pour champagne on top

cocktails.name: Kiwi Lemon
cocktails.instructions: Mix in highball glass. Stirr. Garnish with slice of kiwi.

cocktails.name: Kurant Tea
cocktails.instructions: Pour Absolut Kurant into a comfortably big tea-cup. Add the not too hot(!) apple tea and, if you like, some sugar. Enjoy!

cocktails.name: Kioki Coffee
cocktails.instructions: Stir. Add whipped cream to the top.

cocktails.name: Kiwi Martini
cocktails.instructions:
The kiwi martini is a very fun vodka cocktail and it is one of the best drinks that makes use of fresh fruit. Though there are a few recipes floating around, this is one of the easiest and it is an absolutely delightful green martini to drink.

For this recipe, you'll simply muddle slices of kiwi with simple syrup, then shake it with vodka. It's a drink that anyone can mix up in minutes and a perfect cocktail to show off your favorite vodka.

cocktails.name: Kiss me Quick
cocktails.instructions: mix in the glass

cocktails.name: Kool-Aid Shot
cocktails.instructions: Pour into a large glass with ice and stir. Add a little cranberry juice to taste.

cocktails.name: Kool First Aid
cocktails.instructions: Add Kool Aid to a double shot glass, and top with rum. Slam and shoot.

cocktails.name: Kentucky B And B
cocktails.instructions: Pour the bourbon and Benedictine into a brandy snifter.

cocktails.name: Kentucky Colonel
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes combine the courbon and Benedictine. Shake and strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with the lemon twist.

cocktails.name: Kool-Aid Slammer
cocktails.instructions: Fill half the shot glass with the kool-aid first. Then put a paper towel over the top of the glass and slowly pour in the vodka. If you do it right, you should be able to see that the two liquids are separated, with the vodka on top. Now slam it! The last thing you'll taste is the kool-aid.

cocktails.name: Kiwi Papaya Smoothie
cocktails.instructions: Throw everything into a blender and liquify.

cocktails.name: Kill the cold Smoothie
cocktails.instructions: Juice ginger and lemon and add it to hot water. You may add cardomom.

cocktails.name: Limeade
cocktails.instructions: In a large glass, put the lime juice and sugar, and stir well. Add cold seltzer water to fill. Put the lime peels in the glass. Drink. Repeat until limes or soda run out.

cocktails.name: Lunch Box
cocktails.instructions: Fill a pint glass almost full with beer. Then fill the rest with orange juice (careful not to fill it to the top). Then take the shot of Amaretto and drop it in.

cocktails.name: Lemon Drop
cocktails.instructions: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass rimmed with sugar.

cocktails.name: Lemon Shot
cocktails.instructions: Mix Galliano and Absolut Citron in a shot glass, lay lemon wedge sprinkled with sugar over glass and pour a rum over wedge and glass. light rum with a lighter and let burn for a second. Do shot quickly and suck on lemon. If it is done correctly, this will taste like a shot of sweet lemonade.

cocktails.name: Long vodka
cocktails.instructions: Shake a tall glass with ice cubes and Angostura, coating the inside of the glass. Por the vodka onto this, add 1 slice of lime and squeeze juice out of remainder, mix with tonic, stir and voila you have a Long Vodka

cocktails.name: Lassi Khara
cocktails.instructions: Blend (frappe) in blender until frothy. Add torn curry leaves and serve cold.

cocktails.name: Lassi Raita
cocktails.instructions: Blend the yoghurt and ice cubes together, until the yoghurt becomes more liquid. Add sugar to taste. The lemon/lime is optional but it gives it a slightly tart taste. Dash of salt. Raita is also good for the summer. Instead of having a traditional salad you can make raita instead.

cocktails.name: Lemouroudji
cocktails.instructions: Juice the lemons. Peel and grate the ginger. Place the grated ginger and a liberal dash of the cayenne pepper into a piece of cheesecloth, and tie it into a knot. Let soak in the water. After 15 minutes or so, add the sugar, and the lemon juice. Chill, and serve.

cocktails.name: Loch Lomond
cocktails.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine the Scotch, Drambuie, and vermouth. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with the lemon twist.

cocktails.name: London Town
cocktails.instructions: In a mixing glass half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Stir well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Lassi - Mango
cocktails.instructions: Put it all in a blender and pour over crushed ice. You can also use other fruits like strawberries and bananas.

cocktails.name: Lassi - Sweet
cocktails.instructions: Put all ingredients into a blender and blend until nice and frothy. Serve chilled.

cocktails.name: Limona Corona
cocktails.instructions: Open the Corona. Fill the empty space in the neck in the bottle with the rum. The bottle should be filled to the top. Plug the bottle with your thumb or the palm of your hand. Turn the bottle upside-down so the rum and beer mix. Turn the bottle rightside-up, unplug, and drink.

cocktails.name: Lord And Lady
cocktails.instructions: Pour the rum and Tia Maria into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well.

cocktails.name: Lady Love Fizz
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass over two ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Long Island Tea
cocktails.instructions: Combine all ingredients (except cola) and pour over ice in a highball glass. Add the splash of cola for color. Decorate with a slice of lemon and serve.

cocktails.name: Lone Tree Cooler
cocktails.instructions: Stir powdered sugar and 2 oz. carbonated water in a collins glass. Fill glass with ice, add gin and vermouth, and stir. Fill with carbonated water and stir again. Add the twist of lemon peel and the orange spiral so that the end dangles over rim of glass.

cocktails.name: Lone Tree Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Lazy Coconut Paloma
cocktails.instructions: Mix the coconut liqueur (preferably tequila) with the grapefruit juice and top with soda water. Garnish with a large grapefruit slice against the inside of the glass.

cocktails.name: Long Island Iced Tea
cocktails.instructions: Mix all contents in a highball glass and sitr gently. Add dash of Coca-Cola for the coloring and garnish with lemon or lime twist.

cocktails.name: Lemon Elderflower Spritzer
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients over ice, stir and enjoy!

cocktails.name: Lassi - A South Indian Drink
cocktails.instructions: Blend in a blender for 3 seconds. Lassi is one of the easiest things to make, and there are many ways of making it. Basically, it is buttermilk (yoghurt whisked with water), and you can choose almost any consistency that you like, from the thinnest to the thickest. Serve cold.

cocktails.name: Melya
cocktails.instructions: Brew espresso. In a coffee mug, place 1 teaspoon of unsweetened powdered cocoa, then cover a teaspoon with honey and drizzle it into the cup. Stir while the coffee brews, this is the fun part. The cocoa seems to coat the honey without mixing, so you get a dusty, sticky mass that looks as though it will never mix. Then all at once, presto! It looks like dark chocolate sauce. Pour hot espresso over the honey, stirring to dissolve. Serve with cream.

cocktails.name: Mojito
cocktails.instructions: Muddle mint leaves with sugar and lime juice. Add a splash of soda water and fill the glass with cracked ice. Pour the rum and top with soda water. Garnish and serve with straw.

cocktails.name: Mimosa
cocktails.instructions: Ensure both ingredients are well chilled, then mix into the glass. Serve cold.

cocktails.name: Mai Tai
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice. Strain into glass. Garnish and serve with straw.

cocktails.name: Martini
cocktails.instructions: Straight: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Stir well. Strain in chilled martini cocktail glass. Squeeze oil from lemon peel onto the drink, or garnish with olive.

cocktails.name: Michelada
cocktails.instructions:
Mix the beer with tomato juice, freshly squeezed lime juice, and Worcestershire sauce, teriyaki sauce, soy sauce, or hot sauce.
Served In a chilled, salt-rimmed glass

cocktails.name: Manhattan
cocktails.instructions: Stirred over ice, strained into a chilled glass, garnished, and served up.

cocktails.name: Margarita
cocktails.instructions: Rub the rim of the glass with the lime slice to make the salt stick to it. Take care to moisten only the outer rim and sprinkle the salt on it. The salt should present to the lips of the imbiber and never mix into the cocktail. Shake the other ingredients with ice, then carefully pour into the glass.

cocktails.name: Mauresque
cocktails.instructions:
1 - Pour the Ricard (or pastis)
2 - Pour the orgeat syrup
3 - Finally pour the water and add ice cubes at your convenience.

Add the ice cubes at the end, otherwise the syrup and pastis do not mix well.

cocktails.name: Mint Julep
cocktails.instructions: In a highball glass gently muddle the mint, sugar and water. Fill the glass with cracked ice, add Bourbon and stir well until the glass is well frosted. Garnish with a mint sprig.

cocktails.name: Mudslinger
cocktails.instructions: Add all contents to a large jug or punch bowl. Stir well!

cocktails.name: Martinez 2
cocktails.instructions:
Add all ingredients to a mixing glass and fill with ice.

Stir until chilled, and strain into a chilled coupe glass.

cocktails.name: Moranguito
cocktails.instructions: first you put rhe absinthe, then put tequila, then put the Granadine syrup.

cocktails.name: Miami Vice
cocktails.instructions: First: Mix pina colada with 2.5 oz. of rum with ice(set aside). Second: Mix daiquiri with 2.5 oz. of rum with ice. Third: While frozen, add pina colda mix then daiquiri mix in glass (Making sure they do not get mixed together).

cocktails.name: Moscow Mule
cocktails.instructions: Combine vodka and ginger beer in a highball glass filled with ice. Add lime juice. Stir gently. Garnish.

cocktails.name: Mulled Wine
cocktails.instructions: Simmer 3 cups water with, sugar, cloves, cinnamon sticks, and lemon peel in a stainless steel pot for 10 minutes. Add wine heat to a "coffee temperature" (DO NOT BOIL) then add the brandy.

cocktails.name: Masala Chai
cocktails.instructions: Bring 2 cups of water to boil. Add all the ingredients and boil again for about 15 seconds. Let stand for a minute. Warm milk in a pot. Filter tea into cups. Add milk and sugar. That's IT.

cocktails.name: Munich Mule
cocktails.instructions:
Fill glass with ice
Pour Gin and Lime Juice
Fill glass with Ginger Beer
Garnish with Cucumer and Lime slice

cocktails.name: Mocha-Berry
cocktails.instructions: pour 6 oz. of coffee in a mug or Irish coffee cup. add coca mix and chambord, mix well and top off with whipped cream.

cocktails.name: Mango Mojito
cocktails.instructions:
Squeeze the juice from 1½ limes and blend with the mango to give a smooth purée.
Cut the rest of the limes into quarters, and then cut each wedge in half again. Put 2 pieces of lime in a highball glass for each person and add 1 teaspoon of caster sugar and 5-6 mint leaves to each glass. Squish everything together with a muddler or the end of a rolling pin to release all the flavours from the lime and mint.
Divide the mango purée between the glasses and add 30ml white rum and a handful of crushed ice to each one, stirring well to mix everything together. Top up with soda water to serve and garnish with extra mint, if you like.

cocktails.name: Mojito Extra
cocktails.instructions: Put mint with lemon juice in a glas, mash the mint with a spoon, ice, rum & fill up with club soda. Top it with Angostura.

cocktails.name: Monkey Gland
cocktails.instructions: Shake well over ice cubes in a shaker, strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Midnight Mint
cocktails.instructions: If available, rim cocktail (Martini) glass with sugar syrup then dip into chocolate flakes or powder. Add ingredients into shaker with ice. Shake well then strain into cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Mary Pickford
cocktails.instructions: Shake and strain into a chilled large cocktail glass

cocktails.name: Monkey Wrench
cocktails.instructions: Pour all of the ingredients into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well.

cocktails.name: Negroni
cocktails.instructions: Stir into glass over ice, garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: New York Sour
cocktails.instructions: Shake blended whiskey, juice of lemon, and powdered sugar with ice and strain into a whiskey sour glass. Float claret on top. Decorate with the half-slice of lemon and the cherry and serve.

cocktails.name: Nutty Irishman
cocktails.instructions: Serve over ice

cocktails.name: National Aquarium
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients into a shaker of ice. Shake well. Serve on the rocks.

cocktails.name: New York Lemonade
cocktails.instructions: Serve in a chilled cocktail glass. Lemon and sugar the rim. Stir and Strain.

cocktails.name: Nuked Hot Chocolate
cocktails.instructions: Mix with a bit of milk (1 oz or so) in coffee mug. Nuke mug for about 30-50 seconds. Stir until the heated cocoa dissolves. Fill mug with milk. Nuke for 1-2 minutes, depending on wattage and preferences as to burnt mouth parts.

cocktails.name: Orgasm
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a chilled cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Old Pal
cocktails.instructions: Chill cocktail glass. Add ingredients to a mixing glass, and fill 2/3 full with ice. Stir about 20 seconds. Empty cocktail glass and strain into the glass. Garnish with a twist of lemon peel.

cocktails.name: Old Cuban
cocktails.instructions: Shake a handful of mint, 2oz white rum, 1oz of sugar syrup, 1oz lime juice and 2 dashes angostura bitters with ice. Double strain into a glass and top with 2oz of prosecco.

cocktails.name: Orangeade
cocktails.instructions: Place some ice cubes in a large tumbler or highball glass, add lemon juice, orange juice, sugar syrup, and stir well. Top up with cold soda water, serve with a drinking straw.

cocktails.name: Orange Whip
cocktails.instructions: Pour ingredients over ice and stir.

cocktails.name: Orange Crush
cocktails.instructions: Add all ingredients to tumbler-Pour as shot

cocktails.name: Orange Oasis
cocktails.instructions: Shake brandy, gin, and orange juice with ice and strain into a highball glass over ice cubes. Fill with ginger ale, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Old Fashioned
cocktails.instructions:
Place sugar cube in old fashioned glass and saturate with bitters, add a dash of plain water. Muddle until dissolved.
Fill the glass with ice cubes and add whiskey.

Garnish with orange twist, and a cocktail cherry.

cocktails.name: Oreo Mudslide
cocktails.instructions: Blend Vodka, Kahlua, Bailey's, ice-cream and the Oreo well in a blender. Pour into a large frosted glass. Garnish with whipped cream and a cherry.

cocktails.name: Oatmeal Cookie
cocktails.instructions:
Just mix it all together.
It's meant to be a shot, but it works just fine as a proper adult-sized drink over lots of ice.

Tastes like an oatmeal cookie.

cocktails.name: Orange Push-up
cocktails.instructions: Combine liquors in a blender. Add a half scoop of ice and blend. Garnish with an orange and cherry flag. So good it will melt in your mouth!!!

cocktails.name: Orange Rosemary Collins
cocktails.instructions: Add the spirits to the bottom of the glass and top equally with the mixer drinks. Garnish with orange slices inside the glass as well as some rosemary on top.

cocktails.name: Orange Scented Hot Chocolate
cocktails.instructions: Combine all ingredients in heavy medium saucepan. Stir over low heat until chocolate melts. Increase heat and bring just to a boil, stirring often. Remove from heat and whisk untily frothy. Return to heat and bring to boil again. Remove from heat, whisk until frothy. Repeat heating and whisking once again. Discard orange peel. (Can be prepared 2 hours ahead. Let stand at room temperature. Before serving, bring just to boil, remove from heat and whisk until frothy.) Pour hot chocolate into coffee mugs. Makes 2 servings.

cocktails.name: Owen's Grandmother's Revenge
cocktails.instructions: Add ingredients and mix in blender.

cocktails.name: Paloma
cocktails.instructions: Stir together and serve over ice.

cocktails.name: Paradise
cocktails.instructions: Shake together over ice. Strain into cocktail glass and serve chilled.

cocktails.name: Pink Gin
cocktails.instructions: Pour the bitters into a wine glass. Swirl the glass to coat the inside with the bitters, shake out the excess. Pour the gin into the glass. Do not add ice.

cocktails.name: Pegu Club
cocktails.instructions: Shake, strain, up, cocktail glass

cocktails.name: Pink Lady
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Pink Moon
cocktails.instructions: Slowly shake in a shaker with ice, strain into a square whiskey glass. Top with fresh ice. Add the blackberries to garnish. Add flowers and a green leaf for a special look!

cocktails.name: Penicillin
cocktails.instructions: Shake blended Scotch, lemon juice, honey syrup and ginger syrup with ice. Strain over large ice in chilled rocks glass. Float smoky Scotch on top (be sure to use a smoky Scotch such as an Islay single malt). Garnish with candied ginger.

cocktails.name: Pisco Sour
cocktails.instructions: Vigorously shake and strain contents in a cocktail shaker with ice cubes, then pour into glass and garnish with bitters.

cocktails.name: Porto flip
cocktails.instructions: Shake ingredients together in a mixer with ice. Strain into glass, garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: Pina Colada
cocktails.instructions: Mix with crushed ice in blender until smooth. Pour into chilled glass, garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: Pink Penocha
cocktails.instructions: mix all ingredients into bowl keep iced stir frequently

cocktails.name: Pure Passion
cocktails.instructions: Mix up all ingredients with a cocktail stirrer and serve with crushed ice with mint and edible flour if available.

cocktails.name: Popped cherry
cocktails.instructions: Served over ice in a tall glass with a popped cherry (can add more popped cherries if in the mood)!

cocktails.name: Poppy Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Port Wine Flip
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except nutmeg) with ice and strain into a whiskey sour glass. Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

cocktails.name: Planter's Punch
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients, except the bitters, into shaker filled with ice. Shake well. Pour into large glass, filled with ice. Add Angostura bitters, "on top". Garnish with cocktail cherry and pineapple.

cocktails.name: Pineapple Paloma
cocktails.instructions:
Rub the rim of each glass with lime slice and dip into salt.
Add ice, tequila, grapefruit juice, lime juice and top with pineapple soda.
Give it a quick stir.
Garnish with fresh pineapple or lime.

cocktails.name: Pornstar Martini
cocktails.instructions: Straight: Pour all ingredients into mixing glass with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain in chilled martini cocktail glass. Cut passion fruit in half and use as garnish. Pour prosecco into a chilled shot glass and serve alongside the martini.

cocktails.name: Planter’s Punch
cocktails.instructions: Squeeze an orange and strain the juice. Put all the ingredients in a shaker filled with ice and shake for at least 12 seconds. Strain into a highball glass and decorate with a pineapple wedge or fruit of your choice.

cocktails.name: Port And Starboard
cocktails.instructions: Pour carefully into a pousse-cafe glass, so that creme de menthe floats on grenadine. Serve without mixing.

cocktails.name: Port Wine Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Pysch Vitamin Light
cocktails.instructions: Shake with ice.

cocktails.name: Pink Panty Pulldowns
cocktails.instructions: Shake well

cocktails.name: Passion Fruit Martini
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients into a glass and stir. Garnish with half a passion fruit piece.

cocktails.name: Pineapple Gingerale Smoothie
cocktails.instructions: Throw everything into a blender and liquify.

cocktails.name: Quentin
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the rum, Kahlua, and cream. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass and garnish with the nutmeg.

cocktails.name: Queen Bee
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Quick F**K
cocktails.instructions: In a shot glass add 1/3 Kahlua first. Then 1/3 Miduri, topping it off with a 1/3 bailey's irish cream

cocktails.name: Quick-sand
cocktails.instructions: Simply add the orange juice, quite a quick pour in order to mix the sambucca with the orange juice. The juice MUST have fruit pulp!

cocktails.name: Queen Charlotte
cocktails.instructions: Pour red wine and grenadine into a collins glass over ice cubes. Fill with lemon-lime soda, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Queen Elizabeth
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Quaker's Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Quarter Deck Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Rose
cocktails.instructions: Shake together in a cocktail shaker, then strain into chilled glass. Garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: Radler
cocktails.instructions: Pour beer into large mug, slowly add the 7-up (or Sprite).

cocktails.name: Rum Sour
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the rum, lemon juice, and sugar. Shake well. Strain into a sour glass and garnish with the orange slice and the cherry.

cocktails.name: Rum Punch
cocktails.instructions: Mix all ingredients in a punch bowl and serve.

cocktails.name: Rum Toddy
cocktails.instructions: Dissolve powdered sugar in water in an old-fashioned glass. Add rum and one ice cube and stir. Add the twist of lemon peel and serve.

cocktails.name: Royal Fizz
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except cola) with ice and strain into a chilled collins glass. Fill with cola and serve.

cocktails.name: Rum Cooler
cocktails.instructions: Pour the rum and soda into a collins glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well and garnish with the lemon wedge.

cocktails.name: Rum Runner
cocktails.instructions: Mix all ingredients in glass & add ice.

cocktails.name: Rusty Nail
cocktails.instructions: Pour the Scotch and Drambuie into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well. Garnish with the lemon twist.

cocktails.name: Red Snapper
cocktails.instructions: One shot each, shake n shoot

cocktails.name: Royal Bitch
cocktails.instructions: Into a shot glass layer the Crown Royal on top of the Frangelico.

cocktails.name: Royal Flush
cocktails.instructions: Pour all the ingredients into tumbler over ice. Strain into glass.

cocktails.name: Rum Cobbler
cocktails.instructions: In an old-fashioned glass, dissolve the sugar in the club soda. Add crushed ice until the glass is almost full. Add the rum. Stir well. Garnish with the cherry and the orange and lemon slices.

cocktails.name: Ruby Tuesday
cocktails.instructions: Pour gin and cranberry into a highball filled with ice cubes. Add grenadine and stir.

cocktails.name: Rail Splitter
cocktails.instructions: Mix sugar syrup with lemon juice in a tall glass. Fill up with ginger ale.

cocktails.name: Rosemary Blue
cocktails.instructions:
1) Add the Bombay Sapphire, Blue Curacao, rosemary sprig and gently squeezed lemon wedge to a balloon glass. Swirl well to combine.
2) Fill with cubed ice and top with the Fever-Tree Light Tonic Water.
3) Gently fold with a bar spoon to mix.

cocktails.name: Ramos Gin Fizz
cocktails.instructions:
Prepare all the ingredients on the counter to be able to work well and quickly, especially the cream and egg white.

Pour all the ingredients into a shaker.

Shake vigorously for 1 minute: cream and egg white must be mixed perfectly, so don't rush.

Now open the shaker and put some ice and shake for 1-2 minutes. It depends on how long you can resist!

Pour into a highball glass, add a splash of soda and garnish to taste.

Ramos Gin Fizz was once drunk as an invigorating drink or even as a breakfast, try it as an aperitif and after dinner and you will discover a little gem now lost.

cocktails.name: Royal Gin Fizz
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a highball glass over two ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Rum Milk Punch
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except nutmeg) with ice and strain into a collins glass. Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

cocktails.name: Raspberry Julep
cocktails.instructions: Softly muddle the mint leaves and raspberry syrup in the bottom of the cup. Add crushed ice and Bourbon to the cup and then stir. Top with more ice, garnish with a mint sprig.

cocktails.name: Rum Screwdriver
cocktails.instructions: Pour rum into a highball glass over ice cubes. Add orange juice, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Raspberry Cooler
cocktails.instructions: Pour the raspberry vodka and soda into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well.

cocktails.name: Rum Old-fashioned
cocktails.instructions: Stir powdered sugar, water, and bitters in an old-fashioned glass. When sugar has dissolved add ice cubes and light rum. Add the twist of lime peel, float 151 proof rum on top, and serve.

cocktails.name: Russian Spring Punch
cocktails.instructions: Pour the ingredients into an highball glass, top with Sparkling wine.

cocktails.name: Radioactive Long Island Iced Tea
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients over ice in a very tall glass. Sip cautiously.

cocktails.name: Smut
cocktails.instructions: Throw it all together and serve real cold.

cocktails.name: Spritz
cocktails.instructions: Build into glass over ice, garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: Scooter
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients well with cracked ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Sangria
cocktails.instructions: Mix all together in a pitcher and refrigerate. Add cloves and cinnamon sticks to taste. Serve in wine glasses.

cocktails.name: Stinger
cocktails.instructions: Pour in a mixing glass with ice, stir and strain into a cocktail glass. May also be served on rocks in a rocks glass.

cocktails.name: Sazerac
cocktails.instructions: Rinse a chilled old-fashioned glass with the absinthe, add crushed ice, and set it aside. Stir the remaining ingredients over ice and set it aside. Discard the ice and any excess absinthe from the prepared glass, and strain the drink into the glass. Add the lemon peel for garnish.

cocktails.name: Sidecar
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Snowday
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice. Strain into a chilled rocks glass over fresh ice. Express orange peel over drink and garnish.

cocktails.name: Spice 75
cocktails.instructions:
Gently warm 60g golden caster sugar in a pan with 30ml water and 1 tbsp allspice. Cook gently until the sugar has dissolved, then leave the mixture to cool. Strain through a sieve lined with a coffee filter (or a double layer of kitchen paper).

Pour 60ml of the spiced syrup into a cocktail shaker along with 200ml rum and 90ml lime juice. Shake with ice and strain between six flute glasses. Top up with 600ml champagne and garnish each with an orange twist.

cocktails.name: Snowball
cocktails.instructions: Place one ice cube in the glass and add 1 1/2 oz of Advocaat. Fill up the glass with lemonade and decorate with a slice of lemon. Serve at once.

cocktails.name: Shot-gun
cocktails.instructions: Pour one part Jack Daneils and one part Jim Beam into shot glass then float Wild Turkey on top.

cocktails.name: Salty Dog
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients over ice cubes in a highball glass. Stir well and serve. (Vodka may be substituted for gin, if preferred.)

cocktails.name: Stone Sour
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a chilled whiskey sour glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Sea breeze
cocktails.instructions: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice. Garnish with lime wedge.

cocktails.name: Scotch Sour
cocktails.instructions: Shake scotch, juice of lime, and powdered sugar with ice and strain into a whiskey sour glass. Decorate with 1/2 slice lemon, top with the cherry, and serve.

cocktails.name: Sweet Tooth
cocktails.instructions: Put 2 shots Godiva Liquour into a glass, add as much or as little milk as you would like.

cocktails.name: Screwdriver
cocktails.instructions: Mix in a highball glass with ice. Garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: Sherry Flip
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except nutmeg) with ice and strain into a whiskey sour glass. Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

cocktails.name: Sol Y Sombra
cocktails.instructions: Shake ingredients with ice, strain into a brandy snifter, and serve. (The English translation of the name of this drink is "Sun and Shade", and after sampling this drink, you'll understand why. Thanks, Kirby.)

cocktails.name: Shark Attack
cocktails.instructions: Mix lemonade and water according to instructions on back of can. If the instructions say to add 4 1/3 cans of water do so. Mix into pitcher. Add 1 1/2 cup of Vodka (Absolut). Mix well. Pour into glass of crushed ice. Excellent!

cocktails.name: San Francisco
cocktails.instructions: Take a tall glass and put in a few ice cubes, fill the vodka over it and fill with juice then the "creme", to end fill in the grenadine but very carefully at the side of the glass so it will lay down in the bottom. garnish with orange and strawberry.

cocktails.name: Space Odyssey
cocktails.instructions: Fill glass with ice and add shots of Bacardi and Malibu. Add splash of pineapple juice and top with orange juice. Add grenadine for color and garnish with cherries.

cocktails.name: Sherry Eggnog
cocktails.instructions: Shake sherry, powdered sugar, and egg with ice and strain into a collins glass. Fill with milk and stir. Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

cocktails.name: Sweet Bananas
cocktails.instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended. Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Sweet Sangria
cocktails.instructions: Dissolve the sugar in hot water and cool. Peel the citrus fruits and break into wedges. Mix the wine, sugar syrup, fruit, and Fresca in a pitcher and put in the fridge for a few hours. Serve in tall glasses with a straw.

cocktails.name: Thriller
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into a cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: The Galah
cocktails.instructions: Mix together the alcoholic portions and top with Pineapple and Lime juice.

cocktails.name: Tia-Maria
cocktails.instructions: Boil water, sugar and coffe for 10 mins and let cool. Add rum and vanilla. Put in clean bottle(s) and leave for 1 week before using.

cocktails.name: Tipperary
cocktails.instructions: Stir over ice. Strain into chilled glass. Cut a wide swath of orange peel, and express the orange oils over the drink. Discard orange twist.

cocktails.name: Turkeyball
cocktails.instructions: Shake with ice and strain into a shot glass.

cocktails.name: Texas Sling
cocktails.instructions: Blend with Ice until smooth. Serve in a tulip glass, top with whip cream.

cocktails.name: Thai Coffee
cocktails.instructions: Place the coffee and spices in the filter cone of your coffee maker. Brew coffee as usual, let it cool. In a tall glass, dissolve 1 or 2 teaspoons of sugar in an ounce of the coffee (it's easier to dissolve than if you put it right over ice). Add 5-6 ice cubes and pour coffee to within about 1 inch of the top of the glass. Rest a spoon on top of the coffee and slowly pour whipping cream into the spoon. This will make the cream float on top of the coffee rather than dispersing into it right away.

cocktails.name: Tom Collins
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, lemon juice, and sugar. Shake well. Strain into a collins glass alomst filled with ice cubes. Add the club soda. Stir and garnish with the cherry and the orange slice.

cocktails.name: Tomato Tang
cocktails.instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended. Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Talos Coffee
cocktails.instructions: Add your GM and then add your coffee.

cocktails.name: Tennesee Mud
cocktails.instructions: Mix Coffee, Jack Daniels and Amaretto. Add Cream on top.

cocktails.name: Tequila Fizz
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except ginger ale) with ice and strain into a collins glass over ice cubes. Fill with ginger ale, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Tequila Sour
cocktails.instructions: Shake tequila, juice of lemon, and powdered sugar with ice and strain into a whiskey sour glass. Add the half-slice of lemon, top with the cherry, and serve.

cocktails.name: Thai Iced Tea
cocktails.instructions: Combine Thai tea (i.e., the powder), boiling water, and sweetened condensed milk, stir until blended. Pour into 2 tall glasses filled with ice cubes. Garnish with mint leaves. Makes 2 servings.

cocktails.name: The Last Word
cocktails.instructions: Shake with ice and strain into a cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Turf Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients (except orange peel) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Add the twist of orange peel and serve.

cocktails.name: The Laverstoke
cocktails.instructions:
1) Squeeze two lime wedges into a balloon glass then add the cordial, Bombay Sapphire and MARTINI Rosso Vermouth, swirl to mix.

2) Fully fill the glass with cubed ice and stir to chill.

3) Top with Fever-Tree Ginger Ale and gently stir again to combine.

4) Garnish with a snapped ginger slice and an awoken mint sprig.

cocktails.name: Tequila Slammer
cocktails.instructions: Mix carefully to avoid releasing the dissolved CO2.

cocktails.name: Tequila Sunrise
cocktails.instructions: Pour the tequila and orange juice into glass over ice. Add the grenadine, which will sink to the bottom. Stir gently to create the sunrise effect. Garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: The Philosopher
cocktails.instructions: Add all the spirits in a shaker (best to use Hendricks gin) as well as the orange bitters and lemon juice. Strain into a Margarita glass, top with Prosecco.

cocktails.name: Tuxedo Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Garnish with a cherry and a twist of lemon zest.

cocktails.name: Tequila Surprise
cocktails.instructions: Fill shot glass with Tequila. Add drops of Tobasco sauce.

cocktails.name: Thai Iced Coffee
cocktails.instructions: Prepare a pot of coffee at a good European strength. In the ground coffee, add 2 or 3 freshly ground cardamom pods. Sweeten while hot, then cool quickly. Serve in highball glass over ice, with cream. To get the layered effect, place a spoon atop the coffee and pour the milk carefully into the spoon so that it floats on the top of the coffee.

cocktails.name: The Jimmy Conway
cocktails.instructions:
Fill glass with ice
Pour in The Irishman and Disaronno
Fill to the top with Cranberry Juice
Garnish with a slice of lemon…Enjoy!

cocktails.name: Texas Rattlesnake
cocktails.instructions: Mix all ingredients and Shake well. Sweet at first, with a BITE at the end...

cocktails.name: Vesper
cocktails.instructions: Shake over ice until well chilled, then strain into a deep goblet and garnish with a thin slice of lemon peel.

cocktails.name: Victor
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Vampiro
cocktails.instructions: Vampiros may be made in a tall glass or an old fashioned glass. Bartenders may first "rim" the glass with Kosher Salt, which is done by placing a layer of Kosher Salt on a chopping board, moistening the glass' rim with lime juice or water, and then placing the upside down glass rim onto the Kosher Salt, so that the salt sticks to the moistened rim. The second step is to fill half the glass with ice and add one or two shooter glasses full of high quality Tequila. The next stage is to add the flavouring elements. This is done by squeezing a fresh lime into the glass, adding a few grains of salt, adding citrus-flavoured soda pop, until the glass is 4/5 full, and then adding spicy Viuda de Sanchez (or orange juice, lime juice and pico de gallo). The final step is to stir the ingredients so that the flavours are properly blended.

cocktails.name: Vesuvio
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes, and serve.

cocktails.name: Veteran
cocktails.instructions: Pour the rum and cherry brandy into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well.

cocktails.name: Van Vleet
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes, and serve.

cocktails.name: Vodka Fizz
cocktails.instructions: Blend all ingredients, save nutmeg. Pour into large white wine glass and sprinkle nutmeg on top.

cocktails.name: Vodka Lemon
cocktails.instructions: The vodka lemon is prepared directly in a highball glass or in a large tumbler: put 6-7 ice cubes in the glass, pour the vodka, lemonade and mix with a bar spoon. Finally decorate with a slice of lemon and, if you prefer, add a few mint leaves. Your vodka lemon is ready to be served.

cocktails.name: Vodka Slime
cocktails.instructions: Fill glass with ice. Add vodka, 7-up then finish with the lime juice.

cocktails.name: Vodka Tonic
cocktails.instructions:
Wash and cut 1 wedge and 1 slice of lime or lemon.
Fill a tumbler with fresh ice.
Pour the desired dose of vodka and top up with the tonic.
Squeeze the lime wedge into the glass and decorate with the slice.
That's all, very simple: it's just the recipe for happiness!

cocktails.name: Vodka Martini
cocktails.instructions: Shake the vodka and vermouth together with a number of ice cubes, strain into a cocktail glass, add the olive and serve.

cocktails.name: Vodka Russian
cocktails.instructions: Mix it as a ordinary drink .

cocktails.name: Vermouth Cassis
cocktails.instructions: Stir vermouth and creme de cassis in a highball glass with ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir again, and serve.

cocktails.name: Victory Collins
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except orange slice) with ice and strain into a collins glass over ice cubes. Add the slice of orange and serve.

cocktails.name: Vodka And Tonic
cocktails.instructions: Pour vodka into a highball glass over ice cubes. Fill with tonic water, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Valencia Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Whisky Mac
cocktails.instructions: Pour both of the ingredients into a wine goblet with no ice.

cocktails.name: White Lady
cocktails.instructions: Add all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice. Shake well and strain into large cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Wine Punch
cocktails.instructions: Combine all of the ingredients and pour over a block of ice.

cocktails.name: Wine Cooler
cocktails.instructions: Mix wine and soft drink. Pour into glass. Add ice.

cocktails.name: Winter Rita
cocktails.instructions: Salt rim. Combine all ingredients, shake with ice, and strain over fresh ice.⠀

cocktails.name: Whiskey Sour
cocktails.instructions: Shake with ice. Strain into chilled glass, garnish and serve. If served 'On the rocks', strain ingredients into old-fashioned glass filled with ice.

cocktails.name: White Russian
cocktails.instructions: Pour vodka and coffee liqueur over ice cubes in an old-fashioned glass. Fill with light cream and serve.

cocktails.name: Winter Paloma
cocktails.instructions: Everyone’s favourite Paloma gets a delicious Indian makeover. Tequila reposado infused with “Timur Pepper” which has citrusy & grapefruit notes and is grown at the foothills of Himalaya. It also produces a slightly numbing and tingling sensation on your lip when consumed. We have also spiced up the fresh grapefruit juice with the warming spice blend from Himalaya. The combination of all these interesting elements has allowed us to elevate your Paloma sipping experience.

cocktails.name: White Wine Sangria
cocktails.instructions: Chop the Lemon, Lime and other fruits into large chunks. Fill the Pitcher with the white wine and mix in the Apple Brandy. Top to taste with soda water.

cocktails.name: Whitecap Margarita
cocktails.instructions: Place all ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. This makes one drink.

cocktails.name: Waikiki Beachcomber
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Yellow Bird
cocktails.instructions: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass

cocktails.name: Yoghurt Cooler
cocktails.instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended. Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up. Note: Use lots of ice in this one - great on hot days! To add ice: Remove the center of the cover while the blender is on - drop 3 or 4 ice cubs and blend until they're completely crushed.

cocktails.name: Zorro
cocktails.instructions: add all and pour black coffee and add whipped cream on top.

cocktails.name: Zinger
cocktails.instructions: Get a shot glass and pour in three shots of the schnapps. Do the same with the Surge Cola. Then down it like Scheetz would.

cocktails.name: Zoksel
cocktails.instructions: No specific mixing instructions, just poor every ingredient in one glass. The lemon goes with it.

cocktails.name: Zombie
cocktails.instructions:
Blend at high speed for no more than 5 seconds.

Pour into a glass, add ice cubes to fill, then add the garnish.

*Donn’s mix: Bring 3 crushed cinnamon sticks, 1 cup of sugar and 1 cup of water to a boil, stirring until the sugar is dissolved.

Simmer for 2 minutes, then remove from the heat and let sit for at least 2 hours before straining into a clean glass bottle.

Then add 1 part of the syrup and 2 parts of fresh grapefruit juice together.

cocktails.name: Zambeer
cocktails.instructions: Mix sambuca with rootbeer and stir. Add ice

cocktails.name: Zorbatini
cocktails.instructions: Prepare like a Martini. Garnish with a green olive.

cocktails.name: Zenmeister
cocktails.instructions: Mix together and enjoy

cocktails.name: Zipperhead
cocktails.instructions: Fill glass with rocks, add straw before putting in liquor. Then add the ingredients in order, trying to keep layered as much as possible (i.e. Chambord on bottom, then Vodka, Then soda on top).

cocktails.name: Zima Blaster
cocktails.instructions: Fill glass with ice. Pour in Chambord, then fill with Zima. Mix and enjoy.

cocktails.name: Zizi Coin-coin
cocktails.instructions: Pour 5cl of Cointreau on ice, add 2cl of fresh lemon (or lime) juice, stir gently, and finally add slices of lemon/lime in glass.

cocktails.name: Zimadori Zinger
cocktails.instructions: Pour Zima in a collins glass over ice and then pour the shot of Midori. Don't stir. Garnish with a cherry.

cocktails.name: Zippy's Revenge
cocktails.instructions: Mix Kool-Aid to taste then add Rum and ammaretto. shake well to disolve the sugar in the Kool-Aid... serve cold

cocktails.name: Ziemes Martini Apfelsaft
cocktails.instructions: Serve without ice. At least the juice shold have room temperature.

cocktails.name: 110 in the shade
cocktails.instructions: Drop shooter in glass. Fill with beer

cocktails.name: Black & Tan
cocktails.instructions: Fill pint glass half full with Bass. Next pour Guiness over a spoon slowly until glass is full. If done correctly the Guiness will stay on top and the Bass on bottom hence the name Black & Tan.

cocktails.name: Black and Brown
cocktails.instructions: CAREFULLY to avoid explosive head formation: Pour Beer glass half full of favorite rootbeer and top off with Guinness.

cocktails.name: Caribbean Boilermaker
cocktails.instructions: Pour the Corona into an 18oz beer glass pour the rum into the beer.

cocktails.name: Green Goblin
cocktails.instructions: Cider First, Lager then Curacao

cocktails.name: Snake Bite (UK)
cocktails.instructions: Pour ingredients into a pint glass. Drink. Fall over.

cocktails.name: Snakebite and Black
cocktails.instructions: Put blackcurrant squash in first up to about 1cm in glass. Then add the lager and cider one after another.

cocktails.name: 155 Belmont
cocktails.instructions: Blend with ice. Serve in a wine glass. Garnish with carrot.

cocktails.name: 57 Chevy with a White License Plate
cocktails.instructions: 1. Fill a rocks glass with ice 2.add white creme de cacao and vodka 3.stir

cocktails.name: 747 Drink
cocktails.instructions:
Fill a Collins glass with ice.
Pour in vodka, lime cordial, and cranberry juice.
Fill up with Sprite.
Garnish with a Lime wheel or some cranberries

cocktails.name: 9 1/2 Weeks
cocktails.instructions: Combine all ingredients in glass mixer. Chill and strain into Cocktail glass. Garnish with sliced strawberry.

cocktails.name: A Gilligan's Island
cocktails.instructions: Shaken, not stirred!

cocktails.name: A True Amaretto Sour
cocktails.instructions: Rub the rim of an old fashioned glass with lemon, and dip repeatedly into granulated sugar until it has a good "frosted" rim. Shake a jigger of Amaretto with the juice of 1/2 a lemon. Strain into glass and add ice. Garnish with a Marachino Cherry.

cocktails.name: A.D.M. (After Dinner Mint)
cocktails.instructions: shake vigorously

cocktails.name: Abbey Martini
cocktails.instructions: Put all ingredients into a shaker and mix, then strain contents into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Absolut Summertime
cocktails.instructions: Add all ingredients except lemon to shaker filled with ice. Cover and shake vigorously. Strain contents into ice filled collins glass. Garnish with lemon.

cocktails.name: Absolutely Fabulous
cocktails.instructions: Mix the Vodka and Cranberry juice together in a shaker and strain into a glass. Top up with Champagne.

cocktails.name: Absolutly Screwed Up
cocktails.instructions: Shake it up it tasts better that way, but you can stir it if you want. 6 of those and you will be wasted for the rest of the night.

cocktails.name: Adam & Eve
cocktails.instructions: Shake together all the ingredients and strain into a cold glass.

cocktails.name: Addison Special
cocktails.instructions: Combine ingredients in the order listed into a shaker. Fill half full with ice and shake well. Strain into glass with ice and garnish with a cherry and orange wedge.

cocktails.name: Adios Amigos Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake together all the ingredients and strain into a cold glass.

cocktails.name: Alice Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake well, strain into a large cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Amaretto fizz
cocktails.instructions: Mix Amaretto, orange juice and sparkling wine in a jug. Add a strip orange zest to each glass, if you like.

cocktails.name: Aperol Spritz
cocktails.instructions: Put a couple of cubes of ice into 2 glasses and add a 50 ml measure of Aperol to each. Divide the prosecco between the glasses and then top up with soda, if you like.

cocktails.name: Apple Highball
cocktails.instructions: Add ice in a highball glass. Rub a wedge of fresh lime around rim and place it in the glass. Add a shot of Apple schnapps, a shot of Courvoisier and top up with ginger ale.

cocktails.name: Applejack
cocktails.instructions: Add all ingredients into mixing glass, chill and strain into cocktail glass

cocktails.name: Aquamarine
cocktails.instructions:
Shake well in a shaker with ice.
Strain in a martini glass.

cocktails.name: Arizona Stingers
cocktails.instructions: Place ice cubes in the hurricane glass . Add the 2 HEAPING shots of Absolute Vodka (Note: You can add as many shots of Absolute as you want!) Fill the rest of glass with the Arizona Icetea with lemon. Stir to mix using a spoon. Drink up and enjoy!!!!!!!

cocktails.name: Arizona Twister
cocktails.instructions: Just mix in the shots of rum, vodka, and tequila. Add splashes of the three juices, heavy on the pineapple. Top off with grenadine. Crushed ice should already be in glass. Top off the glass with a pineapple wedge.

cocktails.name: Army special
cocktails.instructions: Pour Vodka, Gin and lime cordial into glass, and top up with crushed ice. Wait for ice to melt slightly and sip without a straw.

cocktails.name: Autumn Garibaldi
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients into a glass over ice and stir with a bar spoon. Garnish with some orange slices.

cocktails.name: Banana Cream Pi
cocktails.instructions: Serve over ice.

cocktails.name: Bee's Knees
cocktails.instructions:
Shake ingredients with crushed ice
Garnish with orange peel

cocktails.name: Blue Hurricane
cocktails.instructions:
If each part is 1/2 oz then use about 2.5 cups of ice.

Blend it all together. 
Drink it with a big straw if you have one.

cocktails.name: Blueberry Mojito
cocktails.instructions: Muddle the blueberries with the other ingredients and serve in a highball glass. Garnish with mint and a half slice of lime.

cocktails.name: Bombay Cassis
cocktails.instructions:
Add the Bombay Sapphire, Crème de Cassis and lime juice to a balloon glass and swirl well to mix.
Fill the glass with good quality cubed ice.
Top up with chilled and freshly opened Fever-Tree Ginger Beer.
Gently stir to combine, top with a gently squeezed lime wedge and finish with a fresh ginger slice.

cocktails.name: Boulevardier
cocktails.instructions: Stir with ice, strain, garnish and serve.

cocktails.name: Bounty Hunter
cocktails.instructions: Add the spirits into a shaker as well as the pineapple juice, strain into a Margarita glass. Top with Prosecco and garnish with Blueberries.

cocktails.name: Butterfly Effect
cocktails.instructions:
Grab your boston tin, fill it with cubes ice and then simply chuck in all your ingredients apart from your lemonade.
Now it’s time to shake what your mama gave you until all your ingredients are blended to perfection.
Add some cubes of ice to your hurricane glass, give them a swill to cool the whole thing down and then strain your raspberry vodka cocktail of wonder into the glass.
Top with lemonade and chuck a sprig of mint on top for garnish.
You can either get drinking at this point or go and try and grab a few butterflies to finish, the choice really is yours.

cocktails.name: Captain Kidd's Punch
cocktails.instructions: Mix all ingredients together in a shaker and strain into a collins glass. Use Caribbean dark Rum for a sweeter taste.

cocktails.name: Cherry Electric Lemonade
cocktails.instructions: Now stir vigorously and then pour over a large cup of ice. Now drink it with a straw and stir occasionally.

cocktails.name: Cocktail Horse’s Neck
cocktails.instructions:
Wash and brush an organic, untreated lemon, then cut a spiral of lemon peel, using a citrus peel. If it is too large, cut it with a sharp knife.

Put some ice in a tall tumbler glass, place the lemon peel inside and pour the cognac, add the ginger beer and let 2-3 drops of Angostura fall into it. Easy to do, but once you try it you'll love it.

cocktails.name: Cosmopolitan Martini
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients in mixing glass half filled with ice, shake and strain into chilled Martini glass.

cocktails.name: Garibaldi Negroni
cocktails.instructions: Mix together in a shaker and garnish with a simple orange slice. Fill your vitamin C and cocktail fix at the same time!

cocktails.name: Gin Basil Smash
cocktails.instructions:
Muddle Basil leaves (~ 10) with Suggar Syrup in a shaker. Add Gin an Lemon Juice.
Filter and serve in a tumbler with ice

cocktails.name: Malibu Twister
cocktails.instructions: Add rum & trister then, add cranberry jucie,stir

cocktails.name: Martinez Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients (except cherry) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Top with the cherry and serve.

cocktails.name: Mountain Bramble
cocktails.instructions: Muddle the blackberries in a tumbler glass. Mix the Gin, lemon juice and sugar syrup in a shaker and strain over chopped ice. Top with Soda water and garnish with more blackberries and some mint

cocktails.name: Castillian Hot Chocolate
cocktails.instructions: Shift the cocoa and sugar together into a medium-sized saucepan. Dissolve the cornstarch in the water, and stir into the cocoa and sugar until it is a smooth paste. Begin heating the mixture, stirring it with a whisk, and gradually pour in the milk. Continue stirring with the whisk as you bring the liquid to a simmer. Allow the chocolate to simmer for about 10 minutes, stirring often, until it is thick, glossy and completely smooth. Serve steaming hot in coffee mug. Serves six.

cocktails.name: Chocolate Beverage
cocktails.instructions: Boil milk in the top of a deep double boiler five minutes. Remove from fire and add chocolate, mixed with the cinnamon, a little at a time, beating with molinillo or egg beater after each addition. When the chocolate is thoroughly blended, heat to the boiling point. Place over bottom of double boiler and add eggs, whipping constantly, until they are thoroughly blended and the mixture is frothing. Serve in coffee mug. Serves eight.

cocktails.name: Microwave Hot Cocoa
cocktails.instructions: Combine sugar, cocoa, salt and hot water in 1-quart micro-proof measuring cup (or coffee mug). Microwave at HIGH (100%) for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until boiling. Add milk, sitr and microwave an additonal 1 1/2 to 2 minutes or until hot. Stir in vanilla, blend well.

cocktails.name: Spanish chocolate
cocktails.instructions: Stir the milk with the chocolate and the cinnamon over low heat until the chocolate dissolves. Add the eggs and beat the mixture until it becomes thick, taking care not to boil. Serve in coffee mug.

cocktails.name: Absinthe #2
cocktails.instructions: Mix together and let sit a few days. Strain through a coffee filter. To serve mix 1 part absinthe to 4 parts water, add ice, enjoy.

cocktails.name: Amaretto Liqueur
cocktails.instructions: Combine sugar and 3/4 cup water in a small saucepan. Bring to a boil, stirring constantly. Reduce heat and simmer until all sugar is dissolved. Remove from heat and cool. In an aging container, combine apricot halves, almond extract, grain alcohol with 1/2 cup water, and brandy. Stir in cooled sugar syrup mixture. Cap and let age for 2 days. Remove apricot halves. (Save apricot halves, can be used for cooking). Add food coloring and glycerine. Stir, recap and continue aging for 1 to 2 months. Re-bottle as desired. Liqueur is ready to serve but will continue to improve with additional aging.

cocktails.name: Angelica Liqueur
cocktails.instructions: Combine all herbs, nuts and spices with vodka in a 1 quart or larger aging container. Cap tightly and shake daily for 2 weeks. Strain through a fine muslin cloth or coffee filter, discarding solids. Clean out aging container. Place liquid back in container. Place sugar and water in saucepan and stir to combine over medium heat. When sugar is completely dissolved, set aside and let cool. When cool combine with food coloring and add to liqueur liquid. Cap and allow to age and mellow in a cool, dark place for one month.

cocktails.name: Caribbean Orange Liqueur
cocktails.instructions: Pare very thinly the bright-colored rind from the oranges (no white). Blot the peel on paper towels to remove any excess oil. Put peel in a 4 cup screw-top jar. Add 2 cups vodka. Close jar. Store in a cool, dark place for 2 days or until the vodka has absorbed the flavor. Remove peel and add remaining vodka. Close jar and add remaining cup of vodka. Close the jar and store in a cool dark place at least 1 month to age.

cocktails.name: Cranberry Cordial
cocktails.instructions: Place the chopped cranberries in a 2 liter jar that has a tight-fitting lid. Add the sugar and rum. Adjust the lid securely and place the jar in a cool, dark place. Invert the jar and shake it every day for six weeks. Strain the cordial into bottles and seal with corks.

cocktails.name: Creme de Menthe
cocktails.instructions: Bring sugar and water to a boil and simmer for 10 minutes. Cool. Add the remaining ingredients and stir. Cover and let ripen for 1 month.

cocktails.name: Scottish Highland Liqueur
cocktails.instructions: Combine all ingreds in aging container. Cover tightly and shake gently several times during the first 24 hrs. After 24 hrs, remove the lemon zest. Cover again and let stand in a cool, dark place for 2 weeks, shaking gently every other day. Strain through a wire sieve to remove the angelica root and fennel. Return to aging container, cover and let stand undisturbed in a cool dark place for 6 months. Siphon or pour clear liqueur into a sterile bottle. The cloudy dregs may be saved for cooking.

cocktails.name: 3-Mile Long Island Iced Tea
cocktails.instructions: Fill 14oz glass with ice and alcohol. Fill 2/3 glass with cola and remainder with sweet & sour. Top with dash of bitters and lemon wedge.

cocktails.name: 410 Gone
cocktails.instructions: Mix together and enjoy!
fill glass with crushed ice. Add vodka. Add a splash of grand-marnier. Fill with o.j.

cocktails.name: 501 Blue
cocktails.instructions: Mix equal amounts into a glass with ice.

cocktails.name: 69 Special
cocktails.instructions: Pour 2 oz. gin. Add 4 oz. 7-up. Add Lemon Juice for flavor. If you are weak, top up glass with more 7-Up.

cocktails.name: A Day at the Beach
cocktails.instructions: Shake Rum, Amaretto, and Orange Juice in a shaker filled with ice. Strain over ice into a highball glass. Add Grenadine and garnish with a Pineapple Wedge and a Strawberry.

cocktails.name: A Furlong Too Late
cocktails.instructions: Pour the rum and ginger beer into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well. Garnish with the lemon twist.

cocktails.name: A midsummernight dream
cocktails.instructions: Mix the strawberrys in a blender Pour it together with the vodka,kirch and strawberry liquer over ice in a shaker. Shake well and pour in a highballglass. Fill up with the Russchian water

cocktails.name: A Night In Old Mandalay
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the light rum, añejo rum, orange juice, and lemon juice. Shake well. Strain into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes. Top with the ginger ale. Garnish with the lemon twist.

cocktails.name: Abbey Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except for the cherry) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Top with the cherry and serve.

cocktails.name: Absolut Stress #2
cocktails.instructions: Mix well. Garnish with Orange and Cherry. Enjoy

cocktails.name: Absolutely Cranberry Smash
cocktails.instructions: Stir ingredients together. Serve over ice.

cocktails.name: Adam Sunrise
cocktails.instructions: Fill blender up with ice. Fill half with Bartons Vodka. Put 10 tsp of sugar, add 1/2 can lemonade concentrate, fill to top with water. Blend for 60 seconds.

cocktails.name: Adonis Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain contents into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: After Dinner Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except lime wedge) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Add the wedge of lime and serve.

cocktails.name: After sex
