cocktails.instructions: Pour the vodka and creme over some ice cubes in a tall glass and fill up with juice. to make it beuty full make the top of the glass with a grenadine and sugar

cocktails.name: After Supper Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Alabama Slammer
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients (except for lemon juice) over ice in a highball glass. Stir, add a dash of lemon juice, and serve.

cocktails.name: Alaska Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain contents into a cocktail glass. Drop in a twist of lemon and serve.

cocktails.name: Alfie Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Combine and shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Alice in Wonderland
cocktails.instructions: Just mix the three ingredients one to one to one

cocktails.name: Allies Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients with ice, strain contents into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Almond Chocolate Coffee
cocktails.instructions: Pour in order into coffee cup. Top with whipped creme and chocolate shcvings.

cocktails.name: Almond Joy
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Amaretto And Cream
cocktails.instructions: Shake well with cracked ice, strain contents into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Amaretto Mist
cocktails.instructions: Pour amaretto in an old-fashioned glass over crushed ice. Add the wedge of lime and serve. (A wedge of lemon may be substituted for lime, if preferred.)

cocktails.name: Amaretto Rose
cocktails.instructions: Pour amaretto and lime juice over ice in a collins glass. Fill with club soda and serve.

cocktails.name: Amaretto Shake
cocktails.instructions: Combine all ingredients in a blender and blend at high speed until smooth. Serve in chilled glass garnished with bittersweet chocolate shavings.

cocktails.name: Amaretto Sour
cocktails.instructions: Shake and strain. Garnish with a cherry and an orange slice.

cocktails.name: Amaretto Stinger
cocktails.instructions: Shake ingredients well with cracked ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Amaretto Sunrise
cocktails.instructions: Mix together the amaretto and orange juice. Pour into glass and then add the grenadine untill you see the sunrise.

cocktails.name: Amaretto Sunset
cocktails.instructions: Shake ingredients in bartender's mixer quickly, just 5 shakes. Strain out ice, serve in glass immediately with a slice of orange.

cocktails.name: Amaretto Tea
cocktails.instructions: Pour hot tea into a pousse-cafe glass, using a spoon in glass to prevent cracking. Add amaretto, but do not stir. Top with chilled whipped cream and serve.

cocktails.name: Angel Face
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice and strain contents into a cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Apricot Lady
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the rum, apricot brandy, triple sec, lemon juice, and egg white. Shake well. Strain into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes. Garnish with the orange slice.

cocktails.name: Archbishop
cocktails.instructions: In an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Stir well.

cocktails.name: Arise My Love
cocktails.instructions: Put creme de menthe into a champagne flute. Fill with chilled champagne and serve.

cocktails.name: Arthur Tompkins
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the gin, Grand Marnier, and lemon juice. Shake well. Strain into a sour glass and garnish with the lemon twist.

cocktails.name: Atlantic Sun
cocktails.instructions: Shake all the ingredients, top the drink with soda. Garnish with a slice of orange.

cocktails.name: Atomic Lokade
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker, place lemonade, vodka, blue Curacao, and triple sec together. Shake with ice and strain into glass. Add sugar to taste

cocktails.name: Autodafé
cocktails.instructions: Mix and fill up with soda water. Drunk by finns on a sunny day any time of the year and day.

cocktails.name: Bacardi Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake together with ice. Strain into glass and serve.

cocktails.name: Banana Daiquiri
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain in chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Bellini Martini
cocktails.instructions:
Add ice cubes to shaker.
Add vodka.
Add peach schnapps.
Add peach nectar.
Shake.
Strain into glass.
Add lemon twist peel.

cocktails.name: Bermuda Highball
cocktails.instructions: Pour brandy, gin, and dry vermouth into a highball glass over ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water and stir. Add the twist of lemon and serve. (Ginger ale may be substituted for carbonated water, if preferred.)

cocktails.name: Between The Sheets
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients into shaker with ice cubes, shake, strain into chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Black Russian
cocktails.instructions: Pour the ingredients into an old fashioned glass filled with ice cubes. Stir gently.

cocktails.name: Bloody Maria
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except lemon slice) with cracked ice and strain into an old-fashioned glass over ice cubes. Add the slice of lemon and serve.

cocktails.name: Bloody Mary
cocktails.instructions: Stirring gently, pour all ingredients into highball glass. Garnish.

cocktails.name: Blue Lagoon
cocktails.instructions: Pour vodka and curacao over ice in a highball glass. Fill with lemonade, top with the cherry, and serve.

cocktails.name: Blue Margarita
cocktails.instructions: Rub rim of cocktail glass with lime juice. Dip rim in coarse salt. Shake tequila, blue curacao, and lime juice with ice, strain into the salt-rimmed glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Blue Mountain
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Shake well. Strain into an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes.

cocktails.name: Bobby Burns Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Stir all ingredients (except lemon peel) with ice and strain into a cocktail glass. Add the twist of lemon peel and serve.

cocktails.name: Boston Sidecar
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Bourbon Sling
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the sugar, water, lemon juice, and bourbon. Shake well. Strain well. Strain into a highball glass. Garnish with the lemon twist.

cocktails.name: Bourbon Sour
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the bourbon, lemon juice, and sugar. Shake well. Strain into a whiskey sour glass, garnish with the orange slice and cherry.

cocktails.name: Brandy Alexander
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except nutmeg) with ice and strain contents into a cocktail glass. Sprinkle nutmeg on top and serve.

cocktails.name: Brandy Cobbler
cocktails.instructions: In an old-fashioned glass, dissolve the sugar in the club soda. Add crushed ice until the glass is almost full. Add the brandy. Stir well. Garnish with the cherry and the orange and lemon slices.

cocktails.name: Brandy Flip
cocktails.instructions: In a shaker half-filled with ice cubes, combine the brandy, egg, sugar, and cream. Shake well. Strain into a sour glass and garnish with the nutmeg.

cocktails.name: Brandy Sour
cocktails.instructions: Shake brandy, juice of lemon, and powdered sugar with ice and strain into a whiskey sour glass. Decorate with the lemon slice, top with the cherry, and serve.

cocktails.name: California Lemonade
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a collins glass over shaved ice. Fill with carbonated water and stir. Decorate with slices of orange and lemon. Add the cherry and serve with a straw.

cocktails.name: Champagne Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Add dash of Angostura bitter onto sugar cube and drop it into champagne flute. Add cognac followed by gently pouring chilled champagne. Garnish with orange slice and maraschino cherry.

cocktails.name: Chocolate Black Russian
cocktails.instructions: Combine all ingredients in an electric blender and blend at a low speed for a short length of time. Pour into a chilled champagne flute and serve.

cocktails.name: Classic Old-Fashioned
cocktails.instructions: In an old-fashioned glass, muddle the bitters and water into the sugar cube, using the back of a teaspoon. Almost fill the glass with ice cubes and add the bourbon. Garnish with the orange slice and the cherry. Serve with a swizzle stick.

cocktails.name: 151 Florida Bushwacker
cocktails.instructions: Combine all ingredients. Blend until smooth. Garnish with chocolate shavings if desired.

cocktails.name: Apple Karate
cocktails.instructions: Place all ingredients in the blender jar - cover and whiz on medium speed until well blended. Pour in one tall, 2 medium or 3 small glasses and drink up.

cocktails.name: Banana Milk Shake
cocktails.instructions: Blend very well, preferably in a household mixer. Serve in a wine glass, garnish with whipped cream and a piece of banana.

cocktails.name: Banana Strawberry Shake
cocktails.instructions: Blend all together in a blender until smooth.

cocktails.name: Banana Strawberry Shake Daiquiri
cocktails.instructions: Blend all together in a blender until smooth.

cocktails.name: Black Forest Shake
cocktails.instructions: In a blender put ice cubes, chocolate syrup, cherry brandy, vodka, and milk. Blend very well.

cocktails.name: Blind Russian
cocktails.instructions: Fill glass with ice. Add all liquers. Add milk. shake.

cocktails.name: Boozy Snickers Milkshake
cocktails.instructions: Place the snickers bars in a plastic bag and roll over them with a rolling pin until crushed. Add crushed snickers pieces, ice cream, milk, caramel sauce, chocolate sauce, and chocolate liquor to a blender. Blend until shake is thick and frothy. Pour into glasses and top with chocolate liquor and whip cream.

cocktails.name: Butter Baby
cocktails.instructions: Blend together in a blender. Serve in a chilled Beer mug with Fresh Blueberries and caramel for topping.

cocktails.name: Chocolate Monkey
cocktails.instructions: blend liqeuors with ice-cream, milk and syrup. pour into parfait glass, top with whipped cream and garnish with banana and cherry.

cocktails.name: 24k nightmare
cocktails.instructions: Add over ice,shake and pour.
Add both ingredients to shot glass, shoot, and get drunk quick

cocktails.name: 3 Wise Men
cocktails.instructions: put them them in a glass... and slam it to tha head.
pour kaluha, then Baileys, then Frangelico not chilled and not layered -- SERVE!!!

cocktails.name: A Splash of Nash
cocktails.instructions: Drop shot glass with banana & melon liquers into a 9 oz hi- ball glass containing soda water and cranberry juice. Drink in one shot.

cocktails.name: Absolut Sex
cocktails.instructions: Shake Absolut Kurant, Midori, and Cranberry juice in shaker with ice: Strain into rocks glass: Splash of seven on top.Absolut Sex.

cocktails.name: After Five
cocktails.instructions: 1. Pour Kahlua into shot glass to about 1/2 full. 2. Using a spoon(inverted), slowly pour in the Peppermint Schnapps until glass is about 3/4 full. Done correctly, the Schnapps will flow under the Kahlua for a clear layer. 3. Again using a spoon, but this time right side up, slowly top off the glass with a layer of Bailey's. Be careful to place the spoon right at the top of the Kahlua layer and to raise it as the glass fills up. Done correctly, this will provide a layer of Bailey's floating over the Kahlua. 4. Toss it down all at once for something like a Peppermint Pattie, WITH A BANG!!! NOTE: Best if all ingredients are chilled

cocktails.name: Apple Slammer
cocktails.instructions: pour into a shot glass and present to consumer, they are expected to cover the top of the shotglass with thier palm, raise the glass, slam it on the bar and the swallow quickly.

cocktails.name: Arizona Antifreeze
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients into shot glass and slam !!!!

cocktails.name: Auburn Headbanger
cocktails.instructions: Mix in spread glass over ice. Strain and pour in shot glass. Sit down before shotting. ENJOY!!

cocktails.name: Baby Guinness
cocktails.instructions: Pour Kahlua, almost filling shot glass. Then, carefully pour Baileys, using wall of shot glass. This will give the "Guinness" its "head".

cocktails.name: Brainteaser
cocktails.instructions: layered erin first, then sambuca and then avocart(should sit in middle of other two. To drink: use a straw to suck up avocart then shot the rest and then suck fumes up through straw.

cocktails.name: Brave Bull Shooter
cocktails.instructions: Pour Tabasco into bottom of shot glass and fill with tequila.

cocktails.name: Bruce's Puce
cocktails.instructions: In a regular-sized shot glass, layer, with a spoon or cherry, the grenadine , the Kahlua , then the Bailey's Irish cream in equal portions. It goes down really smooth ,and you don't even need a chaser. It tastes just like chocolate milk.(Really!)

cocktails.name: Bruised Heart
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients in a mixing tin over ice, stir, and strain into shot glass

cocktails.name: Mother's Milk
cocktails.instructions: Shake over ice, strain. Serves two.

cocktails.name: Slippery Nipple
cocktails.instructions: Pour the Sambuca into a shot glass, then pour the Irish Cream on top so that the two liquids do not mix.

cocktails.name: Adam Bomb
cocktails.instructions: Add ice to blender (or to glass if prefer on the rocks) then fruit, and fruite juice depending on personal prefference then add the Rum, Vodka, Tequila, and triple sec. blend till smooth, rim glass with sugar or salt and pour mixture in. garnish with lemon or lime slice.

cocktails.name: Apricot punch
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingrediants into a large punch bowl. Add ice and 4 oranges that are peeled and divided.

cocktails.name: Arctic Fish
cocktails.instructions: Fill glass with ice and fish, add vodka, grape soda and orange juice. DO NOT STIR!!!!! Serve well chilled.

cocktails.name: Aztec Punch
cocktails.instructions: Mix all ingredients in a pitcher. Mix thoroughly and pour into whatever is available, the bigger the better! This drink packs a big punch, so don't over do it.

cocktails.name: Belgian Blue
cocktails.instructions: Just pour all ingredients in the glass and stir...

cocktails.name: Bloody Punch
cocktails.instructions:
Place the thawed strawberries in a large bowl. Mash them with a fork to ensure no large chunks.

In a punch bowl or pitcher, combine mashed strawberries, lime pulp and soda. Mix well.

Add blueberries and raisins. They will float and look like bugs in the punch.

cocktails.name: Gideon's Green Dinosaur
cocktails.instructions: Add all ingredients in collins glass with ice and stir.

cocktails.name: Screaming Orgasm
cocktails.instructions: Pour first vodka, then Bailey's, then Kahlua into a cocktail glass over crushed ice. Stir. Caution: use only high quality vodka. Cheap vodka can cause the Bailey's to curdle. Test your brand of vodka by mixing 1 Tsp each of vodka and Bailey's first.

cocktails.name: Sex on the Beach
cocktails.instructions: Build all ingredients in a highball glass filled with ice. Garnish with orange slice.

cocktails.name: Gentleman's Club
cocktails.instructions: In an old-fashioned glass almost filled with ice cubes, combine all of the ingredients. Stir well.

cocktails.name: Gin And Tonic
cocktails.instructions: Pour the gin and the tonic water into a highball glass almost filled with ice cubes. Stir well. Garnish with the lime wedge.

cocktails.name: Salted Toffee Martini
cocktails.instructions:
Add ice, toffee gin, chocolate liqueur and Amaretto to a cocktail shaker and shake vigorously. 
Pour the chocolate syrup into a saucer and dip the top of a martini glass into the sauce. Grate some of the Willie\'s sea salt chocolate into another saucer and dip the coated glass, so the flakes stick to the sauce, creating a chocolate rim!
Pour the contents of the shaker into your chocolatey glass and sprinkle with more grated chocolate - enjoy!

cocktails.name: Singapore Sling
cocktails.instructions: Pour all ingredients into cocktail shaker filled with ice cubes. Shake well. Strain into highball glass. Garnish with pineapple and cocktail cherry.

cocktails.name: Surf City Lifesaver
cocktails.instructions: Lots of ice and soda top up in tall glass with cherry and a grin.

cocktails.name: The Strange Weaver
cocktails.instructions: Mix ingredients slowly in a glass with ice, garnish with orange slice

cocktails.name: Amaretto Stone Sour Alternative
cocktails.instructions: Shake sour mix, tequila and amaretto with ice. Strain into highball glass. Add a splash of OJ. Garnish with orange slice and a cherry.

cocktails.name: Apple Grande
cocktails.instructions: Chill both ingredients!! Mix in a tumbler and enjoy!

cocktails.name: Strawberry Margarita
cocktails.instructions: Rub rim of cocktail glass with lemon juice and dip rim in salt. Shake schnapps, tequila, triple sec, lemon juice, and strawberries with ice, strain into the salt-rimmed glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Tommy's Margarita
cocktails.instructions: Shake and strain into a chilled cocktail glass.

cocktails.name: Mississippi Planters Punch
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients (except carbonated water) with ice and strain into a collins glass over ice cubes. Fill with carbonated water, stir, and serve.

cocktails.name: Scotch Cobbler
cocktails.instructions: Pour scotch, brandy, and curacao over ice in an old-fashioned glass. Add the orange slice, top with the mint sprig, and serve.

cocktails.name: Sidecar Cocktail
cocktails.instructions: Shake all ingredients with ice, strain into a cocktail glass, and serve.

cocktails.name: Grape lemon pineapple Smoothie
cocktails.instructions: Throw everything into a blender and liquify.

cocktails.name: Sangria The  Best
cocktails.instructions: Mix wine, sugar and fruit, and let sit in the fridge for 18-24 hours. The mixture will have a somewhat syrupy consistency. Before serving stir in brandy and cut the mixture with soda water until it have a thinner, more wine like consistency. Serve from a pitcher in wine glasses.

cocktails.name: Strawberry Lemonade
cocktails.instructions: Throw everything into a blender and mix until fairly smooth. Serve over ice.

cocktails.name: Swedish Coffee
cocktails.instructions: Pour the coffee in an ordinary coffee cup. Add the aquavit. Add sugar by taste. Stir and have a nice evening (morning)

cocktails.name: Smashed Watermelon Margarita
cocktails.instructions: In a mason jar muddle the watermelon and 5 mint leaves together into a puree and strain. Next add the grapefruit juice, juice of half a lime and the tequila as well as some ice. Put a lid on the jar and shake. Pour into a glass and add more ice. Garnish with fresh mint and a small slice of watermelon.
